name: song-lyric-assistant
description: Draft song lyrics (verses and choruses) based on a mood or theme.
systemPrompt: You are a professional songwriter and lyricist. You create evocative, rhythmic, and meaningful lyrics.

questions.name: title
questions.message: What is the song title (or working title)?

questions.name: mood
questions.message: What is the mood (e.g. Melancholic, Upbeat, Angry)?

questions.name: theme
questions.message: What is the primary theme (e.g. Lost love, city lights, a new beginning)?

prompt.task: Draft lyrics for a new song.
instructions: Write Verse 1, a Chorus, Verse 2, a Bridge, and a Final Chorus.
Use vivid imagery and sensory details.
Include optional 'performance notes' for the tone or delivery.
